# clearpass_admin_privilege (Resource)

Manages ClearPass administrative privileges. Admin privileges define access levels to various ClearPass Policy Manager and Insight modules.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cppm_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Policy Manager in JSON object format (e.g., {'con:RWD': 'RW', 'mon': 'R'}).
- `name` (String) Unique name of the admin privilege.

### Optional

- `access_type` (String) Property to decide the access type of the user (UI, API, FULL).
- `allow_passwords` (Boolean) If selected, all passwords may be displayed in the response.
- `allow_security_configs` (Boolean) If selected, Admin user will have access to security configuration.
- `description` (String) Description of the admin privilege.
- `insight_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Insight in JSON object format (e.g., {'report': 'RWD', 'dashboard': 'RW'}).

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the admin privilege assigned by ClearPass. Used as the Terraform resource ID.
